issues.description: Action type is 'TrashFromHand' but card effect says 'Trash 1 card from the top of your deck' — should be 'ForceDiscard' with source 'Deck', not 'Hand'
Filter is empty {} but should specify source as 'Deck' (trashing from deck, not hand)
Missing Blocker keyword effect — DSL should include a Counter trigger for the blocker ability: 'After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target'
